title: Test Organization and Patterns
content:
Organizing tests well is crucial for maintainability. Follow patterns like Arrange-Act-Assert, use descriptive test names, group related tests in modules, and use helper functions to reduce duplication.

Cargo provides test filtering, output control, and parallel execution. Learn these tools to run tests efficiently during development.
keyPoints: Follow Arrange-Act-Assert for clear test structure
Use nested modules to group related tests
cargo test <pattern> runs only matching tests
